Headline: Yellow Line Service Temporarily Suspended
ShortDescription: Service on the Yellow Line has been temporarily suspended due to a medical emergency on the tracks near Skokie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Service on the Yellow Line has been temporarily suspended due to a medical emergency on the tracks near Skokie.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

 #97 Skokie 

Shuttle buses are available from Howard to Skokie to provide connecting service through the affected area in both directions.

We are working to restore service as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #97 Skokie Temporary Reroute at Niles Center Road/Main
ShortDescription: 97 Skokie buses are temporarily rerouted via Dempster, Skokie and Oakton due to, police activity near Niles Center Road/Main.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

#97 Skokie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Dempster, Skokie, Oakton and over regular route due to, police activity near Niles Center Road/Main.

Allow extra travel time.
